verdict: The FOREO ESPADA delivers clinical-grade blue light (415nm) specifically calibrated for acne-causing bacteria eradication without ingredients. This is a specialized tool best suited for active breakout management rather than comprehensive anti-aging.

_research.name: FOREO ESPADA Acne-Clearing Blue Light Device
pros: Blue light wavelength (415nm) precisely targets P. acnes bacteria
Hypoallergenic silicone design safe for sensitive skin
_research.con: Limited efficacy for non-acne concerns and fewer overall applications compared to multi-purpose devices, reducing versatility.
